executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 139 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 128 as HIGH risk. 43 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-UNKNOWN, CDB-CYB-01, CDB-FIN-09. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
